title: Phyllorkis rhizophorae
taxonomy: Phyllorkis rhizophorae is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is classified under the genus Phyllorkis, which is a group of orchids native to tropical regions of Asia. The family Orchidaceae is one of the largest and most diverse families of flowering plants. Within the Orchidaceae family, Phyllorkis rhizophorae is part of the subfamily Orchideae. This classification helps in identifying and understanding the evolutionary relationships among different orchid species.
